title: ophrys insectifera var. virescens
intro:
Ophrys insectifera var. virescens, also known as the green-flowered bee orchid, is a rare and endemic variety of the Ophrys insectifera species, a type of orchid that mimics the appearance and scent of female insects to attract pollinators.

This plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where its extracts have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ophrys insectifera var. virescens include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are typically used in infusions or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
